title: Publications | Ministry of Health NZ
content:
## Publications Ngā whakaputanga kōrero
- Summary report for the Rongoā Workstream Publication date: 31 August 2023 The summary report of engagement, prepared by Weaving Insights, was part of work led by Manatū Hauora for the rongoā workstream. Publication Māori health Therapeutic products

## Summary report for the Rongoā Workstream
The summary report of engagement, prepared by Weaving Insights, was part of work led by Manatū Hauora for the rongoā workstream.
- Therapeutic products
- Designated Auditing Agency Handbook Publication date: 28 August 2023 Last updated: 8 December 2025 The Designated Auditing Agency Handbook informs the requirements for auditing and audit reporting for certification under the Health and Disability Services (Safety) Act 2001. Publication Certification of health care services

## Designated Auditing Agency Handbook
The Designated Auditing Agency Handbook informs the requirements for auditing and audit reporting for certification under the Health and Disability Services (Safety) Act 2001.
- Certification of health care services
- Precision health: exploring opportunities and challenges to predict, prevent, diagnose, and treat health needs more precisely in Aotearoa New Zealand Publication date: 7 August 2023 This publication is the inaugural Manatū Hauora Long-term Insights Briefing on the topic of precision health. Publication Health technology

## Precision health: exploring opportunities and challenges to predict, prevent, diagnose, and treat health needs more precisely in Aotearoa New Zealand
This publication is the inaugural Manatū Hauora Long-term Insights Briefing on the topic of precision health.
- High-level assessment of Te Aka Whai Ora progress against Cabinet expectations, commitments and priorities for the Hauora Māori Advisory Committee Publication date: 4 August 2023 At the end of March 2023, the Minister and Associate Minister of Health commissioned the Hauora Māori Advisory Committee to undertake a high-level assessment of the early progress and plans of Te Aka Whai Ora to ensure it is meeting expectations, commitments and priorities set by Cabinet. Publication Māori health

## High-level assessment of Te Aka Whai Ora progress against Cabinet expectations, commitments and priorities for the Hauora Māori Advisory Committee
At the end of March 2023, the Minister and Associate Minister of Health commissioned the Hauora Māori Advisory Committee to undertake a high-level assessment of the early progress and plans of Te Aka Whai Ora to ensure it is meeting expectations, commitments and priorities set by Cabinet.
- Greenhouse Gas Emissions for the 2021/22 Financial Year Publication date: 27 July 2023 This document provides the report and inventory for the greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions of the Ministry for the financial year 2021/22 (1 July 2021 to 30 June 2022). Publication About the Ministry Environmental health

## Greenhouse Gas Emissions for the 2021/22 Financial Year
This document provides the report and inventory for the greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions of the Ministry for the financial year 2021/22 (1 July 2021 to 30 June 2022).
- Environmental health
- Independent Review of the Alcohol Levy Stage 1: Rapid Review Publication date: 25 July 2023 The independent alcohol levy review is being undertaken right now and includes broad stakeholder engagement. This report is from the early stage one of the review and sets out some interim recommendations from the reviewers. Stage 2 will be completed towards the end of 2023. Publication Alcohol Public health

## Independent Review of the Alcohol Levy Stage 1: Rapid Review
The independent alcohol levy review is being undertaken right now and includes broad stakeholder engagement. This report is from the early stage one of the review and sets out some interim recommendations from the reviewers. Stage 2 will be completed towards the end of 2023.
- Women’s Health Strategy Publication date: 12 July 2023 The Women’s Health Strategy sets the direction for improving the health and wellbeing of women over the next 10 years. Publication Health system

## Women’s Health Strategy
The Women’s Health Strategy sets the direction for improving the health and wellbeing of women over the next 10 years.
- Rural Health Strategy Publication date: 12 July 2023 The Rural Health Strategy sets the direction for improving the health and wellbeing of rural communities over the next 10 years. Publication Rural health Health system

## Rural Health Strategy
The Rural Health Strategy sets the direction for improving the health and wellbeing of rural communities over the next 10 years.
- Health of Disabled People Strategy Publication date: 12 July 2023 The Health of Disabled People Strategy sets the direction and long-term priorities for the new health system to move towards achieving equity in disabled people’s health and wellbeing outcomes over the next 10 years. Publication Disability Health system

## Health of Disabled People Strategy
The Health of Disabled People Strategy sets the direction and long-term priorities for the new health system to move towards achieving equity in disabled people’s health and wellbeing outcomes over the next 10 years.
- Te Mana Ola : The Pacific Health Strategy Publication date: 12 July 2023 Te Mana Ola is the first-ever legislated Pacific Health Strategy for Aotearoa New Zealand. Te Mana Ola sets the direction and long-term priorities to achieve equity in Pacific health and wellbeing outcomes over the next 10 years. Publication Pacific health Health system

## Te Mana Ola : The Pacific Health Strategy
Te Mana Ola is the first-ever legislated Pacific Health Strategy for Aotearoa New Zealand. Te Mana Ola sets the direction and long-term priorities to achieve equity in Pacific health and wellbeing outcomes over the next 10 years.
- Pae Tū: Hauora Māori Strategy Publication date: 12 July 2023 As part of the health system transformation a range of strategies have been developed to help guide our health system to achieve pae ora , healthy futures. One of those is Pae Tū: Hauora Māori Strategy. It has been produced by Manatū Hauora and Te Aka Whai Ora . Publication Māori health Health system

## Pae Tū: Hauora Māori Strategy
As part of the health system transformation a range of strategies have been developed to help guide our health system to achieve pae ora , healthy futures. One of those is Pae Tū: Hauora Māori Strategy. It has been produced by Manatū Hauora and Te Aka Whai Ora .
- New Zealand Health Strategy Publication date: 12 July 2023 This publication sets the direction for achieving pae ora, healthy futures for all New Zealanders over the next 10 years. Publication Health system

## New Zealand Health Strategy
This publication sets the direction for achieving pae ora, healthy futures for all New Zealanders over the next 10 years.
- Pae Ora Health Strategies: Summary of feedback from engagement Publication date: 12 July 2023 This report summarises the major themes from engagement undertaken to inform the development of the Pae Ora health strategies. Publication Health system

## Pae Ora Health Strategies: Summary of feedback from engagement
This report summarises the major themes from engagement undertaken to inform the development of the Pae Ora health strategies.
- Health Workforce Strategic Framework Publication date: 12 July 2023 This strategic framework is designed to guide health system settings and ensure Aotearoa New Zealand has a sustainable, representative and responsive health workforce that can meet the future needs of people and whānau. Publication Workforce

## Health Workforce Strategic Framework
This strategic framework is designed to guide health system settings and ensure Aotearoa New Zealand has a sustainable, representative and responsive health workforce that can meet the future needs of people and whānau.
- Health and Independence Report 2022 Publication date: 12 July 2023 This publication provides an overview of the state of public health in Aotearoa New Zealand for the 2022 calendar year and presents the latest data on measures of health, causes of health loss, and determinants of health. Publication Statistics

## Health and Independence Report 2022
This publication provides an overview of the state of public health in Aotearoa New Zealand for the 2022 calendar year and presents the latest data on measures of health, causes of health loss, and determinants of health.
